series_metadata.series_description: Monthly statements submitted by securities lending agents, custodial banks for investment accounts, and the external investment manager (IM) for the Southern Ohio Agricultural & Community Development Foundation (SOAC), in which the relevant agent, bank, or IM certifies that it is acting in compliance with relevant investment policies.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until conclusion of current fiscal year, and for an additional 4 fiscal years. ; Electronic: Retain until conclusion of current fiscal year, and for an additional 4 fiscal years., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
